nasb.text: In those days, while Mordecai was sitting at the king’s gate, Bigthan and Teresh, two of the king’s officials from those who guarded the door, became angry and sought to lay hands on King Ahasuerus.

esv.text: In those days, as Mordecai was sitting at the king’s gate, Bigthan and Teresh, two of the king’s eunuchs, who guarded the threshold, became angry and sought to lay hands on King Ahasuerus.

cnv.text: 那時，末底改坐在朝門那裡，王有兩個守門的太監：辟探和提列，一時因為惱怒，正想下手害亞哈隨魯王。

ccb.text: 一天，末底改正在宫门供职，两个守门的太监辟探和提列恼恨亚哈随鲁王，想要下手害他。
